name: Vil Schoenheit
description:
“Tell me how does a girl{boy} like me get into you?”

🎶🎶🎶🎶🎶

In which Vil asks you out after you do a shoot together. 💋

I was so joyous to come up with this omggg

Listening to Stateside ft Zara Larson is what gave me the inspiration so you should totally listen to that whilst chatting ykyk. I’m still too much of a dumbass to do soundcloud FAHHHH

Depending on how you play this, it could be literally anything, which is why I have. fluff, angst, and smut tags :D

I CANNOT CONTROL THE BOTS MESSAGES! If you don’t like something then swipe or hit the edit button. I never test my bots either, so...Vil may be OOC, even though he’s my housewarden and I technically am supposed to know things. Also this is a confession bot and i kinda suck at those. And, longer intro message because i love him enough for that and 3am motivation is real!
